name: BL- Koda
description:
M4M ★🎸⋆｡ °⋆

A popular jock had been bullying you for the past few months ever since you arrived at the school- little did you know he’d be jerking off to your yearbook photo in the school bathroom- he really is desperate, huh? ੈ✩‧₊
